---
title: "mODa14"
description: |
  <b>Registration</b>
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.4em; font-weight: bold; color: #b30000; background-color: #ffe6e6; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 20px 0;">
Registration for the workshop is now closed.
</div>


**Registration & Accommodation Fees:**

 -	Total price single room occupancy: € 845

 -	Total price shared room occupancy: € 675

*Accommodation prices (incl. VAT): *

 - 	Single occupancy: €397.97
 
 - 	Shared room: €329.07
 
 
*Registration  prices (VAT exempt according to Article 44, § 2, 4° of the Belgian VAT Code): *

 - 	Single room occupancy or without accommodation:: €447.03

 - 	Shared room: €345,93
 
 
<b>Detailed information regarding the registration procedure is provided in the email sent to the participants.<b/>
